items.title: Add Jira Issue Key to new Jira integration
items.excerpt: Instead of the former Jira integration column, which gave a live link to the issue, issue keys can only be imported as text. Please bring back the live link.

items.title: Add max limit on dropdown within a form for conference planning
Allow actions/conditions to be rearranged when editing Automations

items.title: I would like to request the option to create tornado charts.
